The '''Espo Walker 91''', also known as the '''M91 light walker'''<ref name="J15">{{JournalCite|15|Special Military Unit Intelligence Update}}</ref> was made for law enforcement and defense of [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]].

==History==
Aside from the CSA, the [[m'Yalfor'ac Order]] also possessed Espo Walker 91s. It was believed that the order obtained them by hijacking a [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] traveling through the [[Kadok Regions/Legends|Kadok Regions]]. The m'Yalfor'ac Order employed this walker on the [[L'Quar'ta|l'Quart'a]] continent on the [[Bitthævrian/Legends|Bitthævrian]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] [[Guiteica/Legends|Guiteica]].

The Order found that the Espo Walker 91 performed excellently as both a patrol and defensive vehicle, operating in the steep ranges in the northern areas of l'Quart'a.

Since being replaced by the [[Espo Walker 101]], any potential buyer could only find used walkers of this kind.
